title: (Deprecated) Upload a video template
content:
Use this endpoint to upload a custom video template to Busines Center and associate the template with a group of catalogs. To learn about how to design a custom video template, refer to [Custom Template Design Guidelines](https://bytedance.feishu.cn/docs/doccnGxGlxEVZVhvGWyq17QTKNe). In addition, in a custom video template, the image layers and text layers need to be named in formats that are supported by TikTok. For details, see [Layer Naming Guidelines](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739470990574594). ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/catalog/template/upload/| /v1.3/catalog/template/upload/| |Request parameter data type |`bc_id`: number
`catalog_ids`: number[]|`bc_id`: string
`catalog_ids`: string[]| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type
Allowed format: `multipart/form-data`. | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required}|string| Business Center ID. | |catalog_ids {Required}|string[]|List of catalog IDs that you want to associate this catalog with. | |file {Required}| file| Template file in ZIP.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/catalog/template/upload/' \ --header 'access-token: abcd' \ --form 'bc_id="abcd"' \ --form 'catalog_ids="[1234567890]"' \ --form 'file=@"/Users/admin/Downloads/Example.zip"' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|The response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|The response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |template_id|string|Template ID.| |catalog_upload_success|number[]|List of catalog IDs that have been successfully associated with this template.| |request_id |string|The log id of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| ```
